title: Cubica Mechanics IR v1alpha1
description: Canonical, bounded and transactional gameplay program embedded in an immutable game bundle.

usage.description: projection-only exposes a labelled player view but cannot be referenced by Mechanics expressions.

bindings.description: Typed values for dynamic storage segments declared by the referenced endpoint.

deckReference.description: A package-declared deck selected either by its legacy literal id or by one bounded action parameter.

entitiesEachStep.description: Execute one bounded body for every member of a prior typed selection in canonical identifier order.

body.description: Existing Mechanics operations executed in an iteration-local result scope. Nested core.entities.each is rejected by the semantic checker.

oneOf.description: Idempotently add one typed value to one directly stored set attribute without replacing independent existing members.

stream.description: Stable named random stream; its counter advances independently from every other stream.
Stable named random stream pinned into deck state for later automatic reshuffles.

onEmpty.description: A reshuffle reuses the named stream pinned by the deck.shuffle operation that created the deck.

source.description: The top is the first order item or the last discard item.

card.description: Optional explicit item identifier; when omitted, the source top is extracted.
